app.name: Learn DQL
app.description: Interactive DQL learning and sandbox — offline-first, optional live environment

scopes.name: storage:logs:read
scopes.comment: Read logs for Grail queries and live-seed feature

scopes.name: storage:buckets:read
scopes.comment: Read bucket metadata for system queries

scopes.name: storage:entities:read
scopes.comment: Read entity model for lookup/join scenarios and dt.entity.* queries

scopes.name: document:documents:read
scopes.comment: List user's notebooks to support Add to Notebook flow

scopes.name: document:documents:write
scopes.comment: Create new notebooks and append queries to existing ones
